questions.question: Use filter_categories with categories equal to Ayashi no Ceres, Aware! Meisaku-kun, Makasete Iruka!, Maken-Ki! OVA, R.O.D: Read or Die, Shingeki no Kyojin Movie: Kanketsu-hen - The Last Attack, Warau Salesman Special Program, Zuihou de Zhaohuan Shi, Doupo Cangqiong 3rd Season, sort_bars with order equal to descending to analyze the reasons why the two works with the highest popularity among the works with a popularity lower than 2000 have such popularity.

answer.value: Both of them are famous, so they are popular due to their popularity. Howerver, owing to the published for a long time, their popularity has waned.

key_insights: both of them are famous, so they are popular due to their popularity.
They have been published for a long time,  so their popularity has waned.

reasoning.reasoning: filter the title have over 2000 popularity

categories: Shingeki no Kyojin Movie: Kanketsu-hen - The Last Attack
